text:
進撃vn-pf20130524巨人 is the 6th track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack II. It is also the 7th track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 2 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

vn – Violin
pf - Piano/Pianoforte (Italian)

Musical motifs

The track incorporates a violin rendition of the verse of Call your name at 0:48-1:20, then the chorus at 1:51-2:40.
